notableEvents.label: 1 run on wild pitch · Bot 1
notableEvents.detail: 0–1 · Wild pitch by pitcher Jacob Misiorowski. Jakob Marsee scores. Xavier Edwards to 3rd. Otto Lopez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Stowers plunked · Bot 1

notableEvents.label: Agustín Ramírez GIDP · Bot 1
notableEvents.detail: Agustín Ramírez grounds into a double play, second baseman Brice Turang to shortstop David Hamilton to first baseman Jake Bauers. Xavier Edwards scores. Otto Lopez to 3rd. Kyle Stowers out at 2nd. Agustín Ramírez out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Javier Sanoja flies out to left fielder Brandon Lockridge.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error vs Otto Lopez · Bot 1

notableEvents.label: Gary Sánchez GIDP · Top 4
notableEvents.detail: Gary Sánchez grounds into a double play, third baseman Graham Pauley to second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Connor Norby. Brice Turang out at 2nd. Gary Sánchez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: David Hamilton steals
notableEvents.detail: Top 6 · 0–3 · David Hamilton steals (5) 2nd base. David Hamilton to 3rd. David Hamilton advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Liam Hicks.
